472.reason: [The condition uses variable 'count' which is not updated during parsing of preceding Decl/FuncDef, leading to incorrect token lookahead. Also, CompUnit.count += 3 skips tokens without verifying they are actually 'int', 'main', and '(', potentially causing misalignment.]

Also, CompUnit.count += 3 skips tokens without verifying they are actually 'int', 'main', and '(', potentially causing misalignment.]
